channel.title: Preact?
channel.description:
Hey devs,
Probably you read about Preact, the React "fork" that is way faster than its parent. My question is: what's your take on Frontity + Preact?
I've done some testing and it seems as Frontity is already using React to add Preact on top of it would be worthless. Is that really the case?

item.title: Preact?
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
cesarkohl:

I’ve done some testing and it seems as Frontity is already using React to add Preact on top of it would be worthless. Is that really the case?

What do you mean by Frontity is already using React to add Preact on top of it?

Also, why do you think using Preact could be a better alternative than using React in Frontity?

Thanks for your feedback!

Read full topic

item.title: Preact?
item.dc:creator: cesarkohl
item.description:
Hey devs,

Probably you read about Preact, the React “fork” that is way faster than its parent. My question is: what’s your take on Frontity + Preact?

I’ve done some testing and it seems as Frontity is already using React to add Preact on top of it would be worthless. Is that really the case?

Read full topic
